start.text: Wow Auntie Tan! Already dressed I see!
start.speaker: player

options.response: Of course, my son says he's coming to fetch me soon. I am so glad to have recovered from my stroke, although my legs are still a bit shaky and I can only walk a bit. I am so happy that I can be discharged!

options.text: Auntie, remember what the PT said! Do try to use the walking frame until you feel stable enough to walk alone!
options.response: Aiya, I know, I know! You very longwinded leh, just like my daughter. 'Auntie, don't do this... Auntie, take your pill...' Anyways, thank you very much. This one is for you.

options.text: Don't go home and straight away go and mop the floor or do housework ah! Remember to rest!
options.response: Aiya, I know, I know! You very longwinded leh, just like my daughter. 'Auntie, don't do this... Auntie, take your pill...' Anyways, thank you very much. This one is for you.
Auntie… don't need to give me things one lah! Keep them for yourself to eat!

insist.text: You must take them, I insist!
insist.speaker: character

options.response: Okay, okay, Auntie Tan! You go home, you must rest more ah!
